description: Unified AI-Powered CRM View — replaces the split Pipeline Kanban + Queue tabs with a single vertical page: Respond Now, Waiting on Them, Nurturing, Cold. Each card is expandable with email context and inline AI draft. 'Draft with Claude' button triggers Anthropic to read the reply, pull relevant clips, and generate a personalized response.

userStories.title: Update server actions: error propagation + dual revalidation
userStories.description: As the CRM system, I need approve/dismiss/snooze/update-draft actions to throw on DB errors and revalidate both pages so useOptimistic can revert on failure and both views stay in sync.
acceptanceCriteria: In queue/actions.ts: approveItem, dismissItem, snoozeItem, updateDraft each check Supabase result and throw on error: const { error } = await db...; if (error) throw new Error(error.message)

approveItem: if the initial .single() fetch returns null (no matching queue item), throw new Error('Queue item not found') before any update — the approve .update().eq() on a missing row returns no error from Supabase, so only the explicit null-check prevents the silent no-op
approveItem: after approving the queue item, also writes waiting_on = 'them' to lead_crm_data for the associated lead_id so the lead moves to Waiting on Them on refresh
In pipeline/actions.ts: moveLeadToColumn checks and throws on Supabase errors; adds revalidatePath('/admin/queue') alongside the existing revalidatePath('/admin/pipeline')
All five actions (approveItem, dismissItem, snoozeItem, updateDraft, moveLeadToColumn) revalidate both /admin/pipeline AND /admin/queue on success
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: This must be done first — all UI stories depend on actions that throw correctly so useOptimistic can revert.

userStories.title: Extend pipeline page data fetching + define EnrichedLead types
userStories.description: As the pipeline page server component, I need to fetch leads and pending queue items in parallel and merge them so each card knows its reply state in a single render pass.
acceptanceCriteria: pipeline/page.tsx fetches leads (via get_pipeline_leads RPC with fallback) AND pending queue items in parallel using Promise.all

Queue item fetch: SELECT id, lead_id, inbox, sender_email, sender_name, gmail_message_id, gmail_thread_id, subject, body_snippet, received_at, draft_status, draft_response, snoozed_until, classification FROM reply_queue WHERE draft_status IN ('pending','needs_manual_draft') OR (draft_status='snoozed' AND snoozed_until < now()) ORDER BY received_at DESC
Server-side merge: EnrichedLead[] = leads.map(l => ({ ...l, queueItem: queueMap[l.lead_id] ?? null })) where queueMap is keyed by lead_id
unmatchedItems = queue items where lead_id is null or not found in leads array

Fallback query (when RPC fails): remove the existing .not('thread_state', 'in', '("cold","dead")') filter so ColdSection is populated; change leads!inner join to plain leads join (left join) to avoid silently dropping lead_crm_data rows
If queue fetch fails independently, page still renders with all queueItem: null — wrap queue fetch in try/catch
Types defined and exported: QueueItem, EnrichedLead (PipelineLead & { queueItem: QueueItem | null }), UnmatchedQueueItem = QueueItem
Typecheck passes with no 'as any' casts
userStories.notes: Types defined here are imported by all downstream UI stories. UnmatchedQueueItem must NOT render lead metadata fields (company, ICP score, campaign) — only sender_email, subject, body_snippet, inbox, received_at, classification.

userStories.title: Add error.tsx boundary for pipeline route
userStories.description: As the pipeline page, I need an error boundary so unexpected fetch failures show a recoverable error state instead of a blank page.
acceptanceCriteria: src/app/admin/pipeline/error.tsx exists
Error page renders: error message, 'Try again' button (calls router.refresh()), and a back link to /admin
Mirror the existing pattern from src/app/admin/queue/error.tsx if it exists
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Must exist before page can fail gracefully. Queue fetch failures are handled inside page.tsx with try/catch and do NOT hit this boundary.

userStories.title: UnifiedCRMView shell — wire all sections together
userStories.description: As the admin pipeline page, I need a single UnifiedCRMView client component that accepts EnrichedLead[] and UnmatchedQueueItem[] and renders all section placeholders so the page has one clear entry point.
acceptanceCriteria: src/app/admin/pipeline/UnifiedCRMView.tsx created as a 'use client' component
Accepts props: { leads: EnrichedLead[]; unmatchedItems: UnmatchedQueueItem[] }
All useOptimistic state (optimisticLeads, expandedId, pendingId) lives at UnifiedCRMView level — section components receive state and callbacks as props
mutationCountRef = useRef(0) defined here — incremented before each mutation, decremented in finally block
Auto-refresh: setInterval calls router.refresh() every 60 seconds, but skips if expandedId !== null || mutationCountRef.current > 0 || isDrafting
Renders sections in order: ProspectsBar → RespondNowSection → WaitingSection → NurturingSection → ColdSection (each as a placeholder div or stub component initially)
pipeline/page.tsx passes EnrichedLead[] and UnmatchedQueueItem[] to UnifiedCRMView instead of PipelineList
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill — page loads at localhost:3080/admin/pipeline?admin_preview=true without errors
userStories.notes: Sections can be stubs at this stage — the goal is wiring the data flow and state ownership.

userStories.title: ProspectsBar — demand/supply filter and counts
userStories.description: As John, I need a header bar showing demand/supply counts and a filter so I can see the shape of my pipeline at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: ProspectsBar component renders three filter tabs: 'All', 'Demand', 'Supply' — active tab highlighted in #92B090/20 bg with #92B090 text
Live counts shown: '{N} demand · {M} supply · {K} need response' — K = count of leads with a pending queue item
Selecting 'Demand' filters all sections to demand leads only; 'Supply' to supply leads only; 'All' shows everything
Filter state lifted to UnifiedCRMView, passed down as prop to all sections
'Signal monitoring — coming soon' text appears right-aligned in var(--text-muted)
When a filter produces zero leads, a page-level empty state shows: 'No {type} leads'
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: RespondNowSection — section header and card list
userStories.description: As John, I need a Respond Now section that surfaces leads needing action so I never miss a reply.
acceptanceCriteria: Section header reads 'Respond Now (N)' where N = count of visible cards after filter
Shows leads where waiting_on='us' AND thread_state!='dead', plus any lead with a pending queue item, plus unmatched queue items
Cards with a queue item show a colored classification badge and inbox label — inbox display mapping: 'claru' → 'claru.ai', 'moonvalley' → 'moonvalley.com'
Cards without a queue item show a muted 'no reply yet' label in badge position
Sort: queue items first by received_at DESC, then manual 'waiting on us' leads by days_silent DESC
Unmatched queue items (no matching lead) shown with orange 'unmatched sender' badge — do NOT render lead metadata (company, ICP score, campaign) for these cards
Empty state: 'All clear — nothing needs a response ✓' with check icon
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: RespondCard accordion — expand/collapse with email display
userStories.description: As John, I need to click a Respond Now card and see the email context inline so I can read the reply without navigating away.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a card expands it in place; clicking again collapses — only one card expanded at a time across ALL sections (expandedId state at UnifiedCRMView level enforces this)
Expanded card shows: lead company, contact name/email, ICP score, campaign name + step
If card has queue item: subject line rendered as clickable link (opens Gmail thread in new tab via gmail_thread_id), body_snippet in muted monospace text below
If card has no queue item: 'No reply received — compose outreach' in muted text
Lead metadata and email content readable without scrolling on a typical laptop screen
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill — expand a card, confirm email content shows

userStories.title: RespondCard draft textarea with auto-save on blur
userStories.description: As John, I need a draft textarea that persists my edits automatically so I don't lose work.
acceptanceCriteria: Expanded card shows textarea pre-filled with draft_response if one exists, else empty with placeholder 'Draft your outreach...'
onBlur: calls updateDraft server action from queue/actions.ts to write value to reply_queue.draft_response
Local React state holds current textarea value before blur; persistence is server-side only
While save is in flight: textarea border shows subtle highlight (border-[#92B090]/40); once saved returns to normal
After editing and clicking elsewhere, collapsing and re-expanding the card shows the saved draft
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill — edit textarea, click away, collapse/reopen card, confirm draft persists
userStories.notes: US-004a must be complete before this story.

userStories.title: RespondCard action buttons — Approve, Dismiss, Snooze
userStories.description: As John, I need Approve, Dismiss, and Snooze buttons on each expanded card so I can take action on a reply inline.
acceptanceCriteria: Expanded card shows three buttons: 'Approve & copy', 'Dismiss', 'Snooze 24h'

'Approve & copy': reads textarea current React state value, calls updateDraft to flush unsaved edits, copies to clipboard (best-effort), then calls approveItem — card disappears from Respond Now and lead appears in Waiting on Them
'Dismiss': calls dismissItem — card removed from list; lead section placement unchanged
'Snooze 24h': calls snoozeItem — card removed; reappears when snoozed_until < now() on next page load
While any action is in flight: all three buttons disabled, card at 50% opacity (useOptimistic optimistic removal)
If action fails (server throws): card returns to full opacity, buttons re-enable, no removal
mutationCountRef incremented before startTransition, decremented in finally block
Imports from both @/app/admin/queue/actions AND @/app/admin/pipeline/actions — both are 'use server' modules, cross-segment import is legal
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill — click Dismiss, confirm card disappears; click Snooze, confirm card disappears
userStories.notes: US-004b and US-009 must be complete before this story.

userStories.title: WaitingSection — compact lead rows with 3-dot move menu
userStories.description: As John, I need a compact Waiting on Them section so I can see outstanding threads and detect when something is going cold.
acceptanceCriteria: Section header reads 'Waiting on Them (N)'

Compact LeadRow per lead: company, contact, thread state chip (hot=orange/text-orange-400, warm=yellow/text-yellow-400, negotiating=sage/#92B090), days_silent (red if >14d, yellow if >7d), campaign step if present
On row hover: 3-dot menu button appears; clicking shows options: 'Move to Respond Now', 'Move to Nurturing', 'Move to Cold'
Move calls moveLeadToColumn with column IDs: 'Move to Respond Now' → 'respond', 'Move to Nurturing' → 'nurturing', 'Move to Cold' → 'cold'
Move is optimistic: card disappears immediately; if server fails, card snaps back with brief error indicator; mutationCountRef incremented/decremented
Filter: waiting_on='them' AND thread_state IN ('hot','warm','negotiating')
Empty state: 'No leads waiting on them' in muted text
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: NurturingSection — compact lead rows with 3-dot move menu
userStories.description: As John, I need a Nurturing section for warm leads with no active ball.
acceptanceCriteria: Section header reads 'Nurturing (N)'
Same compact LeadRow component as US-005
Filter: waiting_on='unknown' AND thread_state='warm'
3-dot menu options: 'Move to Respond Now' → 'respond', 'Move to Waiting on Them' → 'their-court', 'Move to Cold' → 'cold'
Same optimistic move behavior and rollback as US-005
Empty state: 'No leads in nurturing' in muted text
Section header count updates when filter changes
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: ColdSection — collapsed by default
userStories.description: As John, I need a Cold section that starts collapsed so cold leads don't dominate my working view.
acceptanceCriteria: Page loads with ColdSection collapsed — only 'Cold (N) ▸' header visible
Clicking header expands section; clicking again collapses
Filter: thread_state='cold'
Expanded: same compact LeadRow with company name at 60% opacity (text-[var(--text-primary)]/60)
3-dot menu options: 'Move to Respond Now' → 'respond', 'Move to Nurturing' → 'nurturing'
Empty state when expanded: 'No cold leads' in muted text
Section header count (N) visible even when collapsed
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill — confirm section starts collapsed

userStories.title: POST /api/admin/ai-draft route
userStories.description: As the AI draft system, I need a protected API route that generates a reply draft using Claude so the client can trigger AI-assisted drafts without storing API keys in the browser.
acceptanceCriteria: Route file: src/app/api/admin/ai-draft/route.ts with export const maxDuration = 60

Auth: do NOT use assertAdmin() — it trusts x-admin-preview header which any caller can spoof. Use inline check: const supabase = await createSupabaseServerClient(); const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser(); if (!user?.email || !isAdmin(user.email)) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'unauthorized' }, { status: 401 })
Input validation: both leadId and queueItemId required — missing either returns 400
Fetches lead context + queue item body in parallel (Promise.all)

Clip search: clips JOIN dataset_clips ON dataset_clips.clip_id = clips.id JOIN datasets ON datasets.id = dataset_clips.dataset_id; branch on lead.type: 'demand' → datasets.type IN ('game_capture','short_form','long_form'), 'supply' → datasets.type IN ('annotation','classification','instruction'); filter clips.ai_caption IS NOT NULL, LIMIT 5

Calls Anthropic SDK claude-sonnet-4-6 non-streaming max_tokens=300 with system prompt containing: company context, lead.type, thread_state, campaign, ICP score, body_snippet, up to 5 clip captions, and voice rules (under 80 words, no em-dashes, CTA = their behavior question, open with Hey [first name], sign John)

Error handling: 429 → { error: 'rate_limited' } HTTP 503; 529 → { error: 'overloaded' } HTTP 503; 401 (Anthropic key invalid) → { error: 'api_key_error' } HTTP 500; other → { error: 'unknown' } HTTP 503. Note: platform timeout is not catchable server-side.
On success: writes draft to reply_queue.draft_response; revalidates /admin/pipeline AND /admin/queue; returns { draft: string } HTTP 200
SDK does NOT auto-retry 529 (unlike 429) — client handles retry UX
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY must be set in .env.local. The route must use createSupabaseServerClient (not assertAdmin) for auth.

userStories.title: 'Draft with Claude' button in RespondCard
userStories.description: As John, I need a button on each expanded Respond Now card that triggers Claude to draft a reply so I don't have to write from scratch.
acceptanceCriteria: 'Draft with Claude' button appears only when card is expanded AND has a queue item (queueItem !== null)
Clicking button: sets isDrafting = true, sends POST to /api/admin/ai-draft with leadId and queueItemId
While in flight: button shows 'Drafting...' with a spinner; button disabled; Approve/Dismiss/Snooze buttons also disabled
On success: textarea fills with returned draft text; button calls router.refresh() to sync server tree; isDrafting = false; button returns to normal

On error (fetch throws or response.ok is false): button shows user-readable message for 3s ('Rate limited — try in 30s', 'Claude is busy — try again', 'Request timed out — try again', 'Unknown error — try again') then returns to normal
isDrafting is a plain useState boolean — auto-refresh interval checks isDrafting and skips router.refresh() while true
Button does not appear if queueItem is null
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill — click 'Draft with Claude', confirm loading state, confirm draft fills textarea
userStories.notes: US-008a must be complete before this story. Requires a real Anthropic API key in .env.local and a real queue item in the DB.

userStories.title: Remove old Kanban and table code
userStories.description: As the codebase, I need the old Kanban and table split removed so there is one CRM view to maintain.
acceptanceCriteria: This story is only attempted after US-001 through US-011 are verified working in the browser
PipelineKanban.tsx deleted
PipelineList.tsx deleted
Any imports of PipelineKanban or PipelineList removed
pipeline/page.tsx renders UnifiedCRMView only
Typecheck passes with no orphaned imports
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill — pipeline page loads without errors
userStories.notes: LAST story — only clean up dead code after the new view is live.
